publicationPolicy: Research evidence is not publication approval. Every organizer requires a schema-complete batch record and reviewed publication packet; every event requires current date, venue, registration, provenance, and a separate reviewed event decision.

candidates.name: Small World
candidates.eventSignal: Official Mumbai speed-dating schedule lists weekend dates from 2026-07-25 through 2026-08-30 at Moxy Andheri West.
candidates.reviewNotes: Use one multi-city Small World organizer and attach Mumbai as a market; venues and workshops are not separate organizers.

candidates.name: Link & Chill
candidates.eventSignal: Official public Meetup group lists a 2026-07-25 Matheran getaway originating in Dadar and records 126 past events.
candidates.reviewNotes: The operator is not a second organizer. Preserve origin and destination separately for excursions outside Mumbai.

candidates.name: Base Camp Board Gaming Library
candidates.eventSignal: A public 2026-07-26 beginner-friendly meetup listing exists.
candidates.reviewNotes: Dedupe Base Camp, Base Camp BG, and the full name. Verify the suspicious midnight time and withheld location before event publication.

candidates.name: Meeplecon
candidates.eventSignal: Official homepage lists 2026-10-17 and 2026-10-18 at NESCO Goregaon.
candidates.reviewNotes: Confirm the underlying organizer identity and retain the stale alternate-date conflict for reviewer resolution.

candidates.name: Sacred Space Run Club
candidates.eventSignal: Official page describes a free recurring Friday-night Worli Promenade run; the evidenced session is closed.
candidates.reviewNotes: Model the run club under Sacred Space Wellness and verify the next session before event publication.

candidates.name: Academy of Indore Marathoners (AIM)
candidates.eventSignal: Official site lists Indore Rainathon on 2026-08-01.
candidates.reviewNotes: The official page conflicts between Pitra Parvat at 22:00 and Nehru Stadium at 04:30. Resolve before publishing the event.

candidates.name: Indore Toastmasters' Meetup
candidates.eventSignal: Official public Meetup group lists Transcendence on 2026-07-25 and Impact on 2026-07-26, followed by weekly sessions.
candidates.reviewNotes: The discovery umbrella and the two underlying clubs are distinct identities; preserve the club on every event.

candidates.name: Student Activity Council, IIM Indore
candidates.eventSignal: Official i5 Summit site schedules the event for 2026-08-21 through 2026-08-23 on the IIM Indore campus.
candidates.reviewNotes: Use SAC IIM Indore as organizer and i5 Summit as the event brand; verify public admission and campus access.

candidates.name: Security BSides Indore
candidates.eventSignal: Local official sources list training on 2026-09-05 and conference on 2026-09-06 at Jaal Sabha Grah.
candidates.reviewNotes: Retain the conflict that the global BSides calendar labels the date unconfirmed while the local organizer sells tickets.

candidates.name: AFTER FLY
candidates.eventSignal: Official hosted Luma evidence and recent press confirm recurring formats, but the visible registration is closed and no next official date was found.
candidates.reviewNotes: Dedupe against the existing AFTER FLY inventory. Keep the organizer; do not invent or republish an event date.
